manifest.name: Smart Relations

name: Smart Relations

releases.author: DMDerelyn
releases.description:
Smart Relations is a local RAG indexing plugin for Obsidian. It builds deterministic, vectorization-like indexes over every markdown note in your vault and surfaces ranked related notes for whatever you're reading. No API calls, no cloud, no data leaves your machine.

### Highlights
BM25 + tag + term-overlap + graph-proximity scoring — four signals combined with configurable weights to rank related notes
Stable identity via UUID — notes are tracked by an id frontmatter field (legacy uuid: still accepted), so renames and moves never break links
Incremental indexing — only re-indexes notes that change, with a 500 ms debounce
Persistent indexes — saved to disk, loaded on plugin startup; no rebuild on every restart
Related notes panel with per-signal score breakdown
Suggest relations command to add cross-references via fuzzy search
Desktop + mobile — runs on both; two settings (Store term positions, Index batch size) let you trade indexing fidelity for memory on phones and tablets
Claude Code integration — indexes are designed to be read directly by Claude Code; the plugin can deploy a CLAUDE.md to your vault explaining how to use the index generated by this plugin as a basis for RAG-like questioning.

### What's in this release
Frontmatter contract aligned to the cross-project campaign-schema: prefer id and kind, fall back to legacy uuid and type so existing vaults keep working
README and the deployed CLAUDE.md updated with a "Note Identifier" section explaining the contract
License, manifest description, and .gitignore polish for community-plugin submission
Bundle remains zero-dependency at runtime; ~100 KB
Fixing code to comply with Obsidian Community Plugin requirements

### Install
Open Obsidian → Settings → Community plugins and disable Restricted mode if needed
Click Browse, search for Smart Relations, install, enable
Or download main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css from this release into <vault>/.obsidian/plugins/smart-relations/.

Or via [BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat): add repo DMDerelyn/Obsidian-smart-relations.

### Links
[README](https://github.com/DMDerelyn/Obsidian-smart-relations#readme) — full feature list, scoring formulas, settings reference
[Issues](https://github.com/DMDerelyn/Obsidian-smart-relations/issues) — bug reports and feature requests
releases.name: Smart Relations 0.1.2

releases.author: DMDerelyn
releases.description:
**Smart Relations** is a local RAG indexing plugin for Obsidian. It builds deterministic, vectorization-like indexes over every markdown note in your vault and surfaces ranked related notes for whatever you're reading. No API calls, no cloud, no data leaves your machine.

## Highlights

- **BM25 + tag + term-overlap + graph-proximity scoring** — four signals combined with configurable weights to rank related notes
- **Stable identity via UUID** — notes are tracked by an `id` frontmatter field (legacy `uuid:` still accepted), so renames and moves never break links
- **Incremental indexing** — only re-indexes notes that change, with a 500 ms debounce
- **Persistent indexes** — saved to disk, loaded on plugin startup; no rebuild on every restart
- **Related notes panel** with per-signal score breakdown
- **Suggest relations** command to add cross-references via fuzzy search
- **Desktop + mobile** — runs on both; two settings (`Store term positions`, `Index batch size`) let you trade indexing fidelity for memory on phones and tablets
- **Claude Code integration** — indexes are designed to be read directly by Claude Code; the plugin can deploy a `CLAUDE.md` to your vault explaining how to use the index generated by this plugin as a basis for RAG-like questioning.

## What's in this release

- Frontmatter contract aligned to the cross-project `campaign-schema`: prefer `id` and `kind`, fall back to legacy `uuid` and `type` so existing vaults keep working
- README and the deployed `CLAUDE.md` updated with a "Note Identifier" section explaining the contract
- License, manifest description, and `.gitignore` polish for community-plugin submission
- Bundle remains zero-dependency at runtime; ~100 KB

## Install

1. Open Obsidian → **Settings → Community plugins** and disable Restricted mode if needed
2. Click **Browse**, search for **Smart Relations**, install, enable

Or download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` from this release into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/smart-relations/`.

Or via [BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat): add repo `DMDerelyn/Obsidian-smart-relations`.

## Links

- [README](https://github.com/DMDerelyn/Obsidian-smart-relations#readme) — full feature list, scoring formulas, settings reference
- [Issues](https://github.com/DMDerelyn/Obsidian-smart-relations/issues) — bug reports and feature requests
